reviews.comment:
Viernes 23hs, un solo playero trabajando. Les queda muy grande. Realmente un desastre 45 minutos para cargar.

(Translated by Google)
Friday 11 PM, only one attendant working. It's way too big for them. It's a complete disaster; 45 minutes to fill up.

reviewReply.comment:
Gracias por sus comentarios 
Le pedimos disculpas 
Siempre turno noche quedan dos vendedores 
Ajustaremos los controles

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMtckxXUUtREAE

reviews.comment:
Pésima atención de los playeros y no me dejaron usar el baño porque "estaba ocupado" por un playero. Deja mucho que desear el ACA.

(Translated by Google)
The service from the staff was terrible, and they wouldn't let me use the restroom because it was "occupied" by another staff member. The ACA leaves much to be desired.

reviewReply.comment: Gracias por sus comentarios se tomaran las medidas para evitar estos hechos

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMtckthZ1ZBEAE

reviews.comment:
Es variada la atención. Por suerte me tocaron muy amables y serviciales.

(Translated by Google)
The service varies. Luckily, I had very kind and helpful staff.

reviewer.displayName: Cuando podemos Viajamos!! Y algo más

reviews.comment:
Buena atención, limpio y grande. Acceso a baños. Área de comidas y bar. Tiene seguridad.

(Translated by Google)
Good service, clean and spacious. Access to restrooms. Food court and bar. Security is provided.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMtNUk3R2V3EAE

reviews.comment:
Se hace una cola inmensa cuando tienen espacio para dos paralelas, y te obligan a hacer una sola, teniendo 8 surtidores para cargar

(Translated by Google)
There's an enormous queue when they have space for two parallel lines, and they force you to make only one, even though there are 8 pumps available.

reviewReply.comment: Gracias por sus comentarios por un tema de seguridad solo podemos realizar una sola fila saludos
